sessionId.title: Instagram sessionid cookie (optional)
sessionId.description: Your IG 'sessionid' cookie. Without it, anonymous requests get rate-limited (HTTP 429). WARNING: using your account for scraping risks a ban. Use at your own risk.

cookies.title: Full IG cookie string (optional, best)
cookies.description: Paste the whole cookie string (csrftoken=...; sessionid=...; ds_user_id=...; mid=...; ig_did=...). More reliable than sessionid alone — the csrftoken is needed as a header. WARNING: ban risk.

maxPosts.title: Max recent posts per profile
maxPosts.description: How many recent posts to extract per profile (up to ~12 from the public endpoint).

useProxy.title: Use Apify residential proxy
useProxy.description: Recommended — Instagram rate-limits datacenter IPs. Uses residential credit.
